prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为709→709→816→725→749，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约749名。近3年位次在725–816之间波动，2025年较2024 年小幅后移24名；2021–2025年物理类计划分别为54→63→63→63→64人，基本稳定在60人左右；2026年计划大幅缩减至43人，较2025年减少约32.8%，属显著 缩招，按供需关系将推高录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定在第5–6名，稳居全国顶尖C9高校行列，对高分考生 吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（食堂管理事件），但未涉及学术核心声誉；抖音综合热度排名第17（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投 档异常记录仅2022年有中关注信号，未出现严重断档；拥有26个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、人工智能相关学科实力顶尖，与当前高热专业方向高 度契合，对物理类考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类热门专业持续高热推荐；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，物 理类估算约31.4万，较2025年（32.1万）略降约2.2%，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2026年招生计划大幅缩减（-32.8%）将显著推高录取门槛，但考生规模略降（-2.2%）和声誉偏负面形成一定对冲，预计2026年最低位次；预测最低位次 约622名，区间551–693名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能
- 计算机科学与技术（含至诚班、计算机金融实验班）
- 理科试验班（匡亚明学院大理科班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息科学与技术、通信工程、微电子等）
- 软件工程（含智能化软件、至诚班、软工经济创新班）
- 计算机科学与技术（计算机金融实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（数理科学类）
- 理科试验班类（化学与生命科学类）
- 理科试验班类（地球科学与资源环境类）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类预测位次约622名（区间551–693），较2025年大幅前移。位次在区间上限（693名）以内可重点冲刺二档专业，位次优于区间下限（551名）可冲击一档王牌专业（ 人工智能、计算机等）；位次在区间之外建议以二档为主、三档保底。计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业竞争激烈，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 709 → 709 → 816 → 725 → 749, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend, with a baseline of approximately 749 in 2025. Rankings fluctuated between 725 and 816 in the past three years, with a slight decline of 24 places in 2025 compared to 2024. Enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 54 → 63 → 63 → 63 → 64, remaining stable at around 60. In 2026, the plan significantly reduces to 43, a decrease of about 32.8% from 2025, indicating a notable enrollment reduction, which will raise admission thresholds according to supply-demand dynamics.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 5th to 6th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top C9 universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (cafeteria management incident), but it does not affect core academic reputation. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Historical admission anomalies only occurred in 2022 with a medium attention signal, with no severe gaps. It has 26 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, and top-tier AI-related disciplines, highly aligned with current popular majors, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other popular Physics Category majors continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Anhui Province is about 451,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 314,000, a slight decrease of about 2.2% from 2025 (321,000), slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in 2026 enrollment plans (-32.8%) will notably raise admission thresholds, but the slight decrease in candidate numbers (-2.2%) and slightly negative reputation provide some offset, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 622, with a range of 551–693.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science and Technology (including Zhicheng Class, Computer Finance Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College, General Science Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics, etc.)
- Software Engineering (including Intelligent Software, Zhicheng Class, Software Engineering Economics Innovation Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Science Experimental Class (Earth Sciences and Resources Environment)
- Industrial Engineering (Intelligent System Integration Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for Physics Category is approximately 622 (range 551–693), significantly moving forward compared to 2025. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (693) can focus on sprinting for Tier 2 majors; those with rankings better than the lower limit (551) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, etc.); candidates outside the range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as a safety net. Popular majors like Computer and Electronic Information are highly competitive; it is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation grades for a comprehensive choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 149 → 152 → 496 → 388 → 514, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, with a baseline of approximately 514 in 2025. In 2023, due to exam format reform, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 496, rebounded to 388 in 2024, and then moved back to 514 in 2025, indicating high volatility. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 15 → 17 → 31 → 32 → 33 students, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend. In 2026, the plan increases to 37 students, an expansion of about 12.1% compared to 2025, which will lower the admission threshold according to supply and demand.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking steadily at 5th to 6th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top C9 universities in China, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (cafeteria management incident), but it does not affect the core academic reputation. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Historical abnormal admission records only show a medium attention signal in 2022 (differences in major group admission lines), with no severe gaps. It has top liberal arts advantageous disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Law A, Sociology A, and Business Administration A+, which are highly matched with the enrollment majors, making it particularly attractive to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended, and the popularity of hot liberal arts majors remains stable. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance examination is about 451,000, with History Category estimated at about 137,000, a slight decrease of about 2.8% from 2025 (141,000), easing competition pressure slightly. The special type score is 515, with 2026 data missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 enrollment plan expansion (+12.1%) will lower the admission threshold, but the slight decrease in candidate numbers (-2.8%) and the hot liberal arts majors create a certain offset. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 536, with a range of 475–597.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 536 (range 475–597), slightly backward compared to 2025. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (597) can focus on sprinting for Tier 2 majors, while those with rankings better than the lower limit (475) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, etc.). All History Category enrollment majors are popular liberal arts directions, so it is recommended to choose based on discipline evaluation levels and personal interests.
